title: Just Some Curios
description: A simple little mod that adds some convenient curios that are meant to be quality-of-life curios while also being reasonably balanced in terms of crafting and use.
body: I ONLY post my newer mods and mod updates to Modrinth! If you see my mods being uploaded to other websites under my name, THAT IS AN IMPOSTER AND IT HAS BEEN DONE SO WITHOUT MY PERMISSION! PLEASE DO NOT REUPLOAD MY MODS TO OTHER WEBSITES!!! NEVER DOWNLOAD UNOFFICIAL REPOSTS OF MY MODS, AS I DO NOT ENDORSE THEM AND ESPECIALLY BECAUSE THEY COULD BE VIRUSES!!! The ONLY exception are mods hosted on Planet Minecraft with older versions of my mods as that is where I originally started out sharing them! A fairly straight-forward mod that adds Five Magical Gemstone Curios, called Tears, that are based on aspects of Nature and provide some useful effects without making the player too overpowered (Hopefully), and some crafting recipes meant to make obtaining them balanced and fair! - Tear of Fire, which provides Speed and Fire Resistence - Tear of Nature, which provides Night Vision and Poison and Wither Resistence - Tear of Ocean, which provides Dolphin's Grace and Water Breathing - Tear of Sky, which provides Jump Boost and Feather Falling - Tear of Eternity, which provides All of the Above I mostly made this mod because while I enjoy playing with curios, I wanted to create my own that were straightforward and didn't provide too much in terms of boosting defense, health or strength and instead focus on some sortof quality of life/a slight boost to the player. I'm likely not going to add more curios to this, but that could change in the future.
